summary: The user is organizing their film festival schedule for November and December, expressing interest in attending AFI Fest and seeking recommendations for screenwriting competitions and workshops in Los Angeles. They plan to network with industry professionals at the festival and are considering bringing copies of their script while focusing on relationship-building rather than aggressive pitching.
facts: The user has volunteered at the Austin Film Festival for three consecutive years. The user is planning to attend AFI Fest in Los Angeles, USA, from November 3-10, 2023. The user is considering bringing copies of their script to AFI Fest to share with interested industry professionals. The user is active on Twitter and plans to include their handle on their business card. The user is interested in attending panels and workshops focused on screenwriting and filmmaking at AFI Fest. The user is researching notable film festivals happening in November and December 2023. The user is looking for screenwriting competitions and workshops in Los Angeles. The user is prioritizing networking opportunities at AFI Fest while also attending screenings and panels.
